Ancient Wyvern Hide Tunic  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 40
DEX: +20 STA: +10 HP: +50
SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Ancient Wyvern Hide Tunic
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 40
DEX: +20 STA: +10 HP: +50
SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Monk
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):30, 30, 30
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Illia
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-09-11 05:42:52
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Ikatiar the Venom


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded March 6th, 2022 by halfridge
Updated March 7th, 2022

Post Comment
soloable?
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2007 at 11:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1599438145135
8 posts
this guy soloable by a 75 necro?
▲ Page top
jeez
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2004 at 2:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591787303660
10 posts
Any bonehead monks claiming you need str, agility and dex over AC and hitpoints do not pull.

Our role forces us to gear defensively. Our DPS comes from 3 items, OUR WEAPONS and our HASTE. If you are gearing for str or agility and not AC and hitpoints and resists you are insance. AC does not help us beyond a certain point, but you need to at least reach that point!

Why should this go to monks? Because every other class member, that can reach this tunic, can reach better tunics. So please, be a greedy snot and take this away from a monk, and then upgrade 3 days later, while your puller is stuck in something worse.

No warrior is going to wear this long, even iksar. Same for chanters and beastlords (wear is the mana? BSTS LOVE MANA) and a BST will simply upgrade later, because on raids they do not pull and they do not tank. Monk is the only class there that is going to use this raiding, everynight, a long time.

Yes alot of monks claim all/all gear goes to them by divine right. This is NOT one of those cases. This is literraly UBER gear for a monk while it is only mild to moderate gear for any other class.

Hey you are a druid and for shiz and giggles you want tank stats? Lovely, just enjoy them while your monks lack. Keep gimping other classes in your guild with your GREED. You are only going to ditch those losers for a higher tier uber guild soon anyway right?
▲ Page top
RE: jeez
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2004 at 3:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784748590
350 posts
still...beastys can role for this.
There is always the danger that one might upgrade later.
This is no argument to disdain from looting.
And if you have more dkps then the monk you have more right to the items.
▲ Page top
RE: jeez
QuoteReply
# May 01 2004 at 2:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254072480
89 posts
uhh what about Rangers? who love dex, ac, and hps? or a Shaman who could just end up summond on a slow and could use the extra ac, not to mention the hps for canni. This is NOT a MONK only item you make a few decent points but this is just as good for a monk as it is for someone else for other reasons. take a step back and notice just cause its a nice ac/hp item from back in the day doesnt mean its just for monks.


Rangrr Grrl of TP
▲ Page top
RE: jeez
QuoteReply
# May 27 2004 at 3:26 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592791849211
139 posts
The point is that both rangers and shamen are CHAIN armor wearing classes. Monks are LEATHER armor wearing classes. 40 ac on a chest piece with decent stats for a ranger or shaman is pretty low -- not to mention rangers should very rarely get hit and shamen are only slightly more likely to get hit (slow aggro is HUGE). 40 ac on a chest piece with decent stats for a monk however is UBER -- monks are also a class that has a high probability of getting beat on because they are THE pulling class.
▲ Page top
RE: jeez
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2004 at 12:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753934230
215 posts
Still the best piece for a shaman in NToV, AC-wise.
▲ Page top
Monk Only? PFFFTTT!!!
QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2003 at 8:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256667483
11 posts
Ok for those who say this BP should go to monks only obviously don't know what they are talking about. You are probably looking at the weight on the thing and the AC. Stat wise this tunic is just decent. The Ac is of course very nice and the dex isn't bad, hit points on this thing kinda suck though and leave much to be desired after your guild is done ravaging NTOV. Do the monks in my guild have this tunic? Yes they do, but so do the BSTS and whoever else spent their DKP on it. GEAR goes to whoever spends the DKP on it period. If you are in a guild that rewards by merit...then there is no need to complain here. What you should do is take it to your guild forum and complain to the officers and GL or join a guild on a fair DKP system. If your guild is clearing NTOV pretty easily...just want you to know that this tunic is pretty temporary since most players who know what they are doing would rather prefer more HP along with better stats over AC, and those chest pieces will drop in the next few zones that your guild will be able to handle. I have a 65 Beast a 65 Monk and a 60 Cleric. this tunic sits in the bank on my beast...I would rather have my ornate on my BST for the HP and utility for solo purposes for the clicky haste. And gets switched around alot on my monk with fungi and his ornate depending on situation. It is a decent Chest piece but not worth crying over.
▲ Page top
RE
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2003 at 5:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759634421
6 posts

__DEL__1592247140349

well its ALL/ALL and a Beast can use these every bit as much as any Monk....
I would say that leather wearing melee (Monk/Beast) really should be by far the first in consideration for these..although yes +20 Dex would be very desireable for Rogues also...
Chain an Plate classes have better, this is about as good as it gets for Leather....
and a guild that hands these to a chanter or caster should be banned from TOV

# Sep 24 2002 at 9:18 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361870271
2 posts
Heh. If your guild can break in to kill this guy. the tank wouldnt want this... Hes got better. And if some secondary tanks dont... Go kill Derakor the Vindicator, to get his BP instead. much easier break in.. and over all i think an easier mob.. and respawns once every 8 hrs or so.

As usual, this item should go to chars who cant enjoy the high ac of a good plate bp. Namely monkeys and bst for example.

/Saiyuk, yep... a monkey
▲ Page top
RE: This almost makes me sick...
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2004 at 5:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591799242769
2 posts
I agree with Cerestion, any guild who can break in to kill this guy has a tank with better armor than this. Give it to the leather wearing classes (bst or mnk).

Also, those who are complaining about the low hp on this piece, it has 50 hp and 10 stamina (which equals an extra 40 hp). This makes a nice chest piece for a grouping monk, and you are obviously not playing solo if you get in to get this tunic. My monk solos with fungi tunic, but the Ancient Wyvern Hide Tunic is my preference for raids and group play.

▲ Page top
Enchanter
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2002 at 1:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750716991
19 posts
For an enchanter (Or any int caster of cleric), if you are in a guild capeable of getting this item, you can probably at least hope to get Sal'Varae's Robe of Darkness, which has the pathetic stats of AC: +60 Str: +15 Sta: +25 Agi: +25 Dex: +15 Wis: +25 Int: +25 Cha: +25 Magic Resist: +15 Fire Resist: +15 Cold Resist: +15 Poison Resist: +15 Disease Resist: +15 HP: +100 Mana: +100 Weight: 1.0 Effect Flowing Thought I

Sure, the mob which drops the robe is the boss mob of NTOV, but the Ancient Wyvern Hide tunic is the best monk tunic for AC by far, and only the 2nd best AC chanter tunic, with the exception of a GM event artifact that is all all.

Incedentally, off of another NTOV mob comparable to the one which drops the Wyvern hide tunic drops the Ancient Wurm Hide Robe
(LORE ITEM MAGIC ITEM NO DROP
AC: +30 Int: +10 Magic Resist: +15 Fire Resist: +15 Cold Resist: +15 Poison Resist: +15 Disease Resist: +15 Mana: +50 Weight: 5.0
Classes: Necromancer Enchanter Magician Wizard
Races: All Races ) Which incedentally has 2 more AC than the 2nd best monk tunic, the Phase Spider Carapace. Personally, I would rather have the Ancient Wurm Hide Robe than the tunic, although if the tunic dropped and no monks needed it, I could see being in line for it.

Kaylya Shine,
57th Enchanter

#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 15 2001 at 9:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ~~~~~MONK LEWT~~~~~
High level loot 101
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 1:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767823182
29 posts
One thing comes to mind when I read all these posts.
Comedy. This **** is funny.

Roll on this?
Enchanters need it?
Monks don’t need AC?

Well anyways. All of us who actually GO to ToV know better. Instead of some low to mid level person telling everyone who should get it, why don’t you just ask the people who deal with such items where it goes? We really don’t care who YOU think should get it. Worry about who gets a Forman’s tunic, or a Mino axe or something.

You come and pull ToV and tell me Monks don’t need AC.

QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2001 at 5:59 PM Rating: Default

actulay
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2001 at 5:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750893574
37 posts
the ac would do squat for a chanter(besided vulak drop a robe that chanters can use with compareable ac) cause at this level mobs are quading for like 850 to 1k a pop
so even of the extra ac the enchanter gets makes the mob miss 1 hit he is dead anyways actuly at the upper end unless your the main tank with like 1500 or so ac only saves and hps make any reall differnce cause when you fighting mobs that a warrior has to be chealed every 3 seconds or die if you not one of the main tanks and you get agro you die. THe main tanks and the main pullers (usualy a monk sk combo) get priority on ac gear followed by the clerics. In general gear is handed out in such a way as to what is benificial to the GUILD as a whole
Thand 59 monk <Legions of Darkness> Innrouuk

16 posts
Chestplate of Fiery Might +60 AC +7 Str +7 Sta +5 Agi +5 Dex +7 Wis +7 Int +7 Cha +7 vsMg +7 vsFire +7 vsCold +7 vsPos +7 vsDis +30 HP +30 Mana

Warlord's Breastplate +59 AC +16 Str +10 Sta +7 Agi +7 Dex +6 vsMg +10 vsCold +90 HP

True Mithril Breastplate +57 AC +10 Sta +20 Agi +10 Dex +2 vsMg +2 vsFire +2 vsCold +2 vsPos +2 vsDis +50 HP

Breastplate of Superiority +55 AC +4 Str +4 Sta +4 Agi +4 Dex +4 Wis +4 Int +4 Cha +4 vsMg +4 vsFire +4 vsCold +4 vsPos +4 vsDis +50 HP +50 Mana

Breastplate of Eradication +55 AC +10 Str +20 Sta +15 Agi +15 Dex +10 Cha +8 vsMg +8 vsFire +8 vsCold +8 vsPos +8 vsDis +100 HP

Breastplate of the Myrmidon +54 AC +15 Str +10 Sta +7 Agi +7 Dex +10 vsMg +5 vsFire +5 vsCold +10 vsDis +90 HP

Berserker's Breastplate +47 AC +14 Str +10 Sta +7 Agi +5 Dex +4 vsMg +10 vsFire +90 HP

Champion's Breastplate +47 AC +14 Str +10 Sta +5 Agi +7 Dex +4 vsMg +10 vsPos +90 HP

Cobalt Breastplate +45 AC +12 Str +12 Sta +12 Dex +50 HP

Chestplate of Vindication +45 AC +15 Sta +15 vsMg +15 vsFire +15 vsCold +15 vsPos +15 vsDis +100 HP


If any warrior tries to take this BP away from his monk buddy will DIE!!!!!! not that i think any warrior is that stupid

Yes this is Monk
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2001 at 5:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965977775
44 posts
Class / Race

may as well read Monk / Hum,Iks

This armor will always goto Monks first, why? because it just does. Think it doesn't? tough, you can go pull :)

Monks needs all the AC they can get just so they have a chance to get back to camp before the mob kills them(often happens)

Think I'm wrong? /shrug
I'll just go back to wearing this tunic :)
▲ Page top
Drops where?
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2001 at 8:33 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764036108
33 posts
This drops from Ika the Venom, it dropped yesterday and the entire guild awarded it to our guildleader since he never takes any loot. He is usually the one to hand out the loot but the guild has spoken and he happily took it. Is this a monk item or an item for any class? Currently, its the best monk BP in the game so YES, its a monk item. SUCK IT UP

Gargen
59 wizard
▲ Page top
Sigh
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2001 at 10:20 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Well when you get to ToV, you are, as mentioned, with guild, and the drops from mobs such as these will be AWARDED, rarely rolled on. As a result, the raid leader will be looking at it's benefit to future raids, not experience groups, and on raids you aren't mezzing, you expect to die on tash, since that's usually all you will have a chance to do, and 20 something more ac isn't going to save you from melee attacks for, let's say in the case of the mob that drops this, 750s. The monk who is pulling them, though, as mentioned, can use this extra ac and sta to possibly make it back to camp with the pull without quite dying, as there are many instances when they will make it back with under 100hp, or simply get it to camp and then get killed. Any tiny edge you can give them is worth it, believe me, it will help you in the future when they are pulling the mobs that hit for 950 and drop your nice caster items.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 07 2001 at 11:47 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) is it a monk item, OF COURSE IT IS, and yeah i believe it was upgraded and also has like 20 agility and 50 hps.. not sure on the agility but ill go check when i log in my character... and my monk has an ac higher then the average warrior, and yes you do need it if you plan on fighting nasty things in this game... while your at it, grab the boots, sleeves and leggings to match, not only does it look cool but you will have uber ac stats resists and hps by the time your done.. just remember to be in a group of like 60ish and you may be able to take the rampaging nasty down...
